query: Engineer 'u_7732' attempts to deploy a hotfix to production environment 'prod-us-east-1' outside of the approved maintenance window (current time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday).

policy_registry.POL-401: Production deployments require engineer role >= senior-engineer.
policy_registry.POL-402: Production deployments outside approved maintenance windows require CAB approval.
policy_registry.POL-403: Approved maintenance windows are: Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC.

gold_output.reason: Two violations: role insufficient (POL-401); deployment outside maintenance window requires CAB approval (POL-402). POL-403 defines windows but is not itself a compliance check.
